channel.title: Platform Engineering on DevOps Qatar | Platform Engineering & DevOps Consulting Doha
channel.description: Recent content in Platform Engineering on DevOps Qatar | Platform Engineering & DevOps Consulting Doha

item.title: Platform Engineering for Doha Fintechs: QFC Compliance Without Sacrificing Speed
item.description: Qatar’s QFC-licensed fintechs face a compliance-speed paradox. Platform engineering - policy-as-code, compliant golden paths, automated audit trails - resolves it.

item.title: DevOps in Qatar's Oil & Gas Sector: Bridging OT and IT
item.description: Qatar’s energy sector is adopting DevOps - but the OT/IT boundary creates unique delivery pipeline challenges. Here’s what DevOps looks like in a QatarEnergy-adjacent software context.
